Capsule.title: Capsule
Capsule.description: A secure, sealed container for holding time-locked memories, files, and recordings.

description.description: Summary or note regarding the contents.

unlockDate.description: ISO date-time string indicating when the capsule can be opened.

isGift.description: Flag indicating if this capsule was sent as a shareable link/gift.

giftLink.description: Public sharing URL for the gift landing page.

isOpened.description: Flag indicating whether the capsule has been opened.

items.description: List of keepsake items stored within the capsule.

createdAt.description: ISO date-time when the capsule was sealed.

userId.description: UID of the owner user in Firebase Authentication.

/capsules/{capsuleId}.description: Master collection storing all time capsule vaults.
